title: Dependency choices
details: better-sqlite3 failed on Windows due to missing Visual Studio C++ toolchain.
Switched to sql.js to avoid native builds.
If switching back, install Visual Studio with Desktop development with C++ workload.

title: Goal: codex-mem parity with claude-mem
details: We are building a program similar to https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem but for Codex workflows.
Key parity gaps logged as bd issues: hooks, worker service, session schema, compression pipeline, hybrid search, privacy tagging.

title: Codex hook lifecycle scripts added
details: Added session-start, prompt-submit, post-tool-use, stop, and session-end hook scripts under src/hooks.
Hooks post JSON to the worker service and accept stdin payloads for lifecycle events.

title: Compression pipeline (heuristic) added
details: Added src/compress.ts with heuristic compression, tag inference, and type inference.
Worker now compresses observations before storing them.
Limit configurable via CODEX_MEM_MAX_OBSERVATION_CHARS.

title: Core architecture scaffolded
details: Minimal CLI, sqlite storage (sql.js), capture/retrieve/inject, compaction/purge implemented.
Event log stored at .codex-mem/events/events.log.

title: Privacy tag stripping applied at hooks and worker
details: Hook scripts strip <private> and <codex-mem-context> tags; empty payloads are skipped.
Worker also strips/redacts prompts and summaries as a safety net.

title: Session + observation schema added
details: Added sessions, user_prompts, observations, session_summaries tables.
Added FTS5 virtual tables and triggers for observations, summaries, and prompts.

title: Worker service added
details: Added src/worker.ts with HTTP API endpoints for sessions, prompts, observations, summaries, and completion.
Implements in-memory async queue for observations and writes to sqlite.

title: Injection formatting
details: Injection builds index + samples + instructions with token cap; no glossary/pinned sections yet.

title: Retrieve supports format and JSON output
details: Added --format index|full and --json output to retrieve command.
Shared formatter helpers in src/format.ts for index/full rendering.

title: Event logging
details: Pipeline logs capture/retrieve/inject events to .codex-mem/events/events.log (append-only).

title: Claudemem parity issues created
details: codex-mem-3qt: Hook-based session lifecycle for Codex
codex-mem-7hs: Worker service with async queue + HTTP API
codex-mem-4jz: Session + observation schema (sessions, prompts, observations, summaries)
codex-mem-go2: Compression pipeline for tool observations
codex-mem-brv: Hybrid search (FTS5 + embeddings + recency)
codex-mem-s5t: Privacy tagging and edge filtering

title: Additional roadmap issues created
details: codex-mem-aiw: Add tests for db search ranking and injection size caps
codex-mem-pgt: Implement retrieve --format full/index and optional JSON output
codex-mem-mzj: Add glossary + pinned memory sections in injection output
codex-mem-58a: Replace hand-rolled TOML parsing with a proper parser and validation
codex-mem-4po: Add Codex hook adapter for session start and tool capture

title: MCP usage updated: skip astrodocs and playwright
details: Astro docs MCP and Playwright MCP are skipped for this project per user instruction.
MCP order now uses list_mcp_resources/templates, deepwiki, context7, then sequential-thinking if needed.

title: MCPs used in efficient order
details: Order: list_mcp_resources -> list_mcp_resource_templates -> deepwiki ask -> context7 resolve/get -> astrodocs search -> playwright navigate/snapshot/close -> sequential-thinking.
Use DeepWiki for repo schemas and architecture, Context7 for library APIs, Astro docs for Astro-specific questions, Playwright for UI checks, sequential-thinking for short planning.

title: Config parsing
details: Config uses a hand-rolled TOML parser; issue logged to replace with a proper parser + validation.

title: Beads/bd setup status
details: bd onboard completed; AGENTS.md updated with bd prime quick reference.

title: Injection output sections updated
details: Injection output now includes pinned and glossary sections with stable ordering and token-aware trimming.
Added tests to cover pinned/glossary sections and size cap behavior.

title: Config parsing uses TOML parser
details: Swapped hand-rolled parsing for js-toml with validation and unknown key checks.
Added config parsing tests for overrides and invalid config values.

title: Memory logging guidance added
details: AGENTS.md now documents when and how to update memory.jsonl during changes.

title: Hybrid search uses embeddings fallback
details: Added memory embeddings storage with a lightweight hash-based embedding and cosine similarity fallback when FTS has no hits or is disabled.
Embedding search applies recency filtering and backfills missing embeddings.

title: Codex hook adapters added
details: Added Codex-specific hook adapters for session start and post tool use to normalize payloads and forward to worker endpoints.
Adapters accept nested payloads and map tool input/output into observation bodies.

title: Codex hook adapter schema follow-up
details: Issue codex-mem-llr created to validate Codex hook payload shapes and adjust adapters as needed.
